title: Décor Insulated Cool Touch Double Wall Travel Coffee Cup, Leak Proof Seal and Button Press Release Drink Feature. Vacuum Insulated 4 Hour Hot and 12 Hours Cold. Black 350ml.
features: KEEPS DRINKS HOT FOR 4 HOURS: The Decor 350ml Travel Mug keeps your drinks hot for 4 hours and cold for 12 hours. Made with vacuum insulated stainless steel for superior thermal performance and designed to keep your coffee, tea, hot chocolate, herbal teas etc with that perfect fresh made taste.

LIGHTWEIGHT AND STYLISH- Our 350ml Travel Mug is a convenient size for car cup holders, desks and a great on the go travel mug. The black colour is a great accessory to any outfit or occasion. Also available in White, Rose Gold and Navy.

SAFETY BUTTON FUNCTION - Easy to use button press to release and stop hot drink flow. Our 350ml Travel Mug has a unique cool touch double wall design to ensure the cup is the perfect holding temperature. Our Travel Mug range is dual purpose for hot and cold use, making this the ideal all day re-usable drinking option.

ECO-FRIENDLY TRAVEL MUG: At Décor we create high quality, reusable and durable mugs and flasks that are designed to last offering our customers a cost-saving & environmentally friendly drinking solutions that reduce single use cups and mugs

DÉCOR have over 60 years market experience of providing leading food storage, hydration and lunch solutions that are not only functional, exceptional value for money but also at the heart of our consumers needs.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Coffee, Herbal Tea, Hot Water, Tea, Water
